description: As a Senior Associate in the Internal Audit department at Meridian Global Industries, format the SOX 404 internal control walkthrough document 'ap_walkthrough_raw.docx' for presentation to external auditors. Apply 'Heading 1' style to the five top-level section headers (1. PURPOSE AND SCOPE through 5. CONCLUSION) and 'Heading 2' style to all numbered sub-section headers. Convert the five control description blocks in Section 3 (AP-CTRL-001 through AP-CTRL-005) into formatted two-column tables capturing the key fields. Insert at least three footnotes with relevant audit-standards citations at appropriate locations. Add a document header containing 'Meridian Global Industries, Inc. | SOX 404 AP Walkthrough | CONFIDENTIAL' and save the file as 'ap_walkthrough_final.docx' in the Desktop\WordTasks folder.

metadata.industry: Accounting Tax Preparation Bookkeeping and Payroll Services
